fields.label: Stripe Settings
fields.description: Which Stripe Settings record (from the payments app) provides the publishable/secret keys.

fields.label: Stripe Webhook Secret
fields.description: Signing secret from the Stripe Dashboard webhook endpoint (whsec_...). Required for webhook verification.

fields.label: Live Mode
fields.description: Cosmetic flag — the actual mode is determined by which Stripe Settings record is selected above.
